name: Hillary for America
subject: A free trip to meet Hillary in NYC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
You could meet Hillary in New York City!
| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI3NTQ2ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgwMTE1ODEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjI3NTQ2ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgwMTE1ODEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)[ **https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary/**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjI3NTQ2ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgwMTE1ODEyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
| Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 5/11/15 and 5/28/15 or 5/29/15 and 6/7/15. Enter by contributing [**here**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI3NTQ2ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgwMTE1ODEyS0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjI3NTQ2ODQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgwMTE1ODEyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. Two winners will receive a special invitation to a campaign event with Hillary Clinton, round trip tickets for winners to event from within the 50 U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico, two nights hotel accommodations (approx. retail value of all prizes $4000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201.
---
| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---

name: Ben Carson
subject: My lunch with our contest winner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28150926:27054653688:m:1:876315805:C07049162E4A37E950841CC292FBA4D6:r)
---
|

Peter,

This Saturday I had the honor of sitting down for lunch in Dallas with our "Lunch with Ben" contest winner and her guest. Our winner was Candace S. from Charlotte, North Carolina and she brought along her 12-year-old son. I've included a picture of all of us below.

Like many of our supporters, Candace is not someone who is regularly involved in politics. She is a housewife who has spent her time raising a beautiful family, and who also leads a regular Bible Study program.

I also spent a good deal of time speaking with her son, who ironically wrote a report about me in school last year. I was thrilled to be able to sign it for him.

|
---

I wanted to share this with you not only to let you know who won our contest, but to underscore an important point about our campaign.

Our campaign is not driven by Washington power brokers or special interest lobbyists.

**It is driven by the American people, many of whom are not political, but who love our country and care deeply about its future. **

I am deeply humbled by the fact that so many people tell me that they were ready to give up on America, but that my candidacy has inspired them to once again get involved.

I would not have run for President if I didn't believe that together, we could re-establish a government of, by and for the people. And the more I spend time with supporters like Candace and her son, the more I believe we are well on our way.

We will absolutely be doing contests like this again, and I hope you'll participate.

[**Thank you for your continued support**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28150926:27054653688:m:1:876315805:C07049162E4A37E950841CC292FBA4D6:r)**.**

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28150926:27054653688:m:1:876315805:C07049162E4A37E950841CC292FBA4D6:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28150927:27054653688:m:1:876315805:C07049162E4A37E950841CC292FBA4D6:r)
---
|
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28150928:27054653688:m:1:876315805:C07049162E4A37E950841CC292FBA4D6:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28150929:27054653688:m:1:876315805:C07049162E4A37E950841CC292FBA4D6:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28150930:27054653688:m:1:876315805:C07049162E4A37E950841CC292FBA4D6:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28150931:27054653688:m:1:876315805:C07049162E4A37E950841CC292FBA4D6:r)
---|---|---|---
Make a donation | | Show your support for Ben on social media

Carson America, Inc. | 1800 Diagonal Rd Suite 140 | Alexandria, VA 22314

| Paid for by Carson America, Inc.
---

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: FWD:: Did you see this?
body:
I'm Running For President. Be A Day One Supporter. Friend,

Since my announcement yesterday, the response and feedback I've received from thousands of Americans has been outstanding... but **I want to hear from you**.

When I think ahead to everything we must accomplish to win the Republican nomination and go on to win the White House, **I know I can't get the job done without you by my side**.

**[Will you support my campaign with a DAY ONE Founding Member donation? Follow this link to give as generously as you can.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28152955:27056606588:m:1:877327319:589CBB3DEA4A0074200B65FEA6B823E3:r)**

Our country cannot afford a third term of Barack Obama - which is precisely what Hillary Clinton would be, and America cannot afford to have a president who doesn't have the experience to lead in a dangerous world. That's why I hope you will join my team today.

Your donation, no matter the amount, will make a huge impact. **[Please become a DAY ONE supporter by making a donation now](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28152955:27056606588:m:1:877327319:589CBB3DEA4A0074200B65FEA6B823E3:r)**.

Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

* * *
| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

Just moments ago I officially announced that I am running for the Republican nomination for President of the United States.

**Will you stand with me today as a DAY ONE Founding Member of my campaign?[Please follow this link to make an instant online contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28152955:27056606588:m:1:877327319:589CBB3DEA4A0074200B65FEA6B823E3:r)**.

I did not make this decision lightly. After months of consideration and years of working to protect and secure our country, I knew I could still do more.

**Our country very much needs a proven leader...**
* Who is ready to be Commander in Chief on Day One and has the conviction to defeat our enemies...
* Who can inspire Americans to build on the best our country has to offer...
* And who can cast a vision for a strong, secure and prosperous nation that Americans can rally around and give their full support.

**The greatest issue America faces is the growing threat to our nation's security from terrorist organizations with more capabilities, more arms, more recruits and more safe havens to attack the U.S. than at any time before 9/11.**

I recently retired as a Colonel from the U.S. Air Force Reserves after a 33-year career in the Air Force, National Guard and Reserves. I've visited and served in Afghanistan and the Middle East more than 20 times gaining first-hand knowledge about terror groups that threaten our way of life.

**Friend, I have the understanding, experience and leadership that is needed to protect this country. If you agree that we need an experienced leader in the White House, then I hope you will stand with me today by making a Day One supporter donation.**

**[Please click on one of the instant donate buttons below to make a Day One donation.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28152955:27056606588:m:1:877327319:589CBB3DEA4A0074200B65FEA6B823E3:r)**

| [** $5 Day One Supporter >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28152956:27056606588:m:1:877327319:589CBB3DEA4A0074200B65FEA6B823E3:r) | [** $10 Day One Supporter >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28152957:27056606588:m:1:877327319:589CBB3DEA4A0074200B65FEA6B823E3:r)
---|---
[** $25 Day One Supporter >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28152958:27056606588:m:1:877327319:589CBB3DEA4A0074200B65FEA6B823E3:r) | [** $50 Day One Supporter >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28152959:27056606588:m:1:877327319:589CBB3DEA4A0074200B65FEA6B823E3:r)
[** $75 Day One Supporter >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28152960:27056606588:m:1:877327319:589CBB3DEA4A0074200B65FEA6B823E3:r) | [** $100 Day One Supporter >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28152961:27056606588:m:1:877327319:589CBB3DEA4A0074200B65FEA6B823E3:r)
[** $250 Day One Supporter >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28152962:27056606588:m:1:877327319:589CBB3DEA4A0074200B65FEA6B823E3:r) | [** $500 Day One Supporter >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28152963:27056606588:m:1:877327319:589CBB3DEA4A0074200B65FEA6B823E3:r)

I'm running for President to do the big things. I believe in the near future our great country is going to face tremendous challenges - both at home and abroad - and we are going to need proven leadership to meet those challenges.

I have a proven conservative record of getting things done and bringing common-sense solutions to the table. I've been in the middle of debates, confrontations and decision-making on the critical issues - taxes, job creation, debt, Social Security, energy, military spending and foreign policy.

More than anything, our nation needs a president who will make the tough decisions needed to keep us safe and carry on the great promise of America.

**I am hoping that today I can count on you to[become a Day One Founding Member of my presidential campaign](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28152955:27056606588:m:1:877327319:589CBB3DEA4A0074200B65FEA6B823E3:r)**.

The road ahead will not be easy, but I take comfort knowing I have your friendship and support.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. I am 100% committed to becoming the Republican nominee for president and going one-on-one against Hillary Clinton next year. I promise a hard-hitting, honest and winning fight, but I need your immediate help to ensure we have the funds needed to do so. **[Please send whatever you can afford today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28152955:27056606588:m:1:877327319:589CBB3DEA4A0074200B65FEA6B823E3:r)**. Thanks, Lindsey

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28152955:27056606588:m:1:877327319:589CBB3DEA4A0074200B65FEA6B823E3:r)

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
[click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isRwGo31VN).
[Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osRwGo31VN) | [Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osRwGo31VN)

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: Video update: my next step
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

There are howls of rage across Washington.

I stood against President Obama and forced his illegal domestic spying program to expire and now the establishment is lining up against me.

But I came here to defend the Constitution.

And outside the beltway, Americans are demanding their government abide by the Bill of Rights.

Over 200,000 patriots stood with me against President Obama over the NSA's illegal spying program and our movement was able to earn a victory no one saw coming.

My campaign has prepared a new TV ad on my NSA showdown against President Obama.

**[Please take a few moments to watch the ad and help me get it in front of as many voters as possible in the key states by chipping in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28155616:27058459012:m:1:879035888:B8B64CE12753B0815A6A59ABDE926C04:r)**?

Fellow Conservative, the spy state apologists were FUMING after my ten-and-a-half-hour filibuster and repeated objections blocked them from rushing renewal of these illegal programs through Congress.

They were asking us to "trust" President Obama with the collection of our phone records.

Well after the revelations that the IRS was targeting tea party groups for harassment and the Director of National Intelligence lying to Congress about the existence of the NSA's illegal spying program "trust Obama" is out the window.

And these programs don't even work!

The FBI admitted the NSA's programs helped them crack exactly ZERO cases!

So I took a stand and I fought.

And I refused to give an inch.

The very heart of the Washington Machine's abuse of our liberties is President Obama's illegal NSA spying program.

And standing up for the Bill of Rights and demanding an end to illegal domestic spying is what Americans outside the beltway are crying out for.

That's why polls in states like Colorado, Iowa, New Hampshire and Pennsylvania all show me leading Hillary Clinton in head-to-head matchups.

I'm the Republican best positioned to defeat her because I stand up to President Obama and the Washington Machine's illegal assaults on the Bill of Rights.

Fellow Conservative, I need your help to spread this message far and wide.

**[So please chip in a contribution of $20.16 and help my campaign get this ad in front of as many voters as possible](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28155616:27058459012:m:1:879035888:B8B64CE12753B0815A6A59ABDE926C04:r)**.

It was because true patriots across America stood with me that I was able to force President Obama's illegal NSA spying program to expire.

While this was an important first step toward ending illegal NSA spying once-and-for-all this fight will continue.

I'm pushing to make sure this week will end with President Obama barred from collecting our phone records.

**[So help me spread my message to as many voters as possible by chipping in a contribution of $20.16 to get my campaign's new TV ad on the air in key states today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28155616:27058459012:m:1:879035888:B8B64CE12753B0815A6A59ABDE926C04:r)**!

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28155617:27058459012:m:1:879035888:B8B64CE12753B0815A6A59ABDE926C04:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28155618:27058459012:m:1:879035888:B8B64CE12753B0815A6A59ABDE926C04:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28155619:27058459012:m:1:879035888:B8B64CE12753B0815A6A59ABDE926C04:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28155620:27058459012:m:1:879035888:B8B64CE12753B0815A6A59ABDE926C04:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28155616:27058459012:m:1:879035888:B8B64CE12753B0815A6A59ABDE926C04:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28155616:27058459012:m:1:879035888:B8B64CE12753B0815A6A59ABDE926C04:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28155621:27058459012:m:1:879035888:B8B64CE12753B0815A6A59ABDE926C04:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28155622:27058459012:m:1:879035888:B8B64CE12753B0815A6A59ABDE926C04:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28155623:27058459012:m:1:879035888:B8B64CE12753B0815A6A59ABDE926C04:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Jeff Weaver, Bernie 2016
subject: You'll like this from the New York Times
body:
#
Friend -
We're on the move and there is growing energy in the campaign. Check out these excerpts from yesterday's _New York Times_ article: "Challenging Clinton, Sanders Gains Momentum in Iowa..."
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb216e/43f17890/5e4f1d73/621dddf1/699165009/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-win-this?refcode=em150602b")
"A mere 240 people live in the rural northeast Iowa town of Kensett, so when more than 300 crowded into the community center on Saturday night to hear Senator Bernie Sanders of Vermont, many driving 50 miles, the cellphones of Democratic leaders statewide began to buzz."
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb216e/43f17890/5e4f1d73/621dddf1/699165009/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-win-this?refcode=em150602b")
"Mr. Sanders's stop at a brewery in Ames on Saturday was so mobbed that more than 100 people who could not fit inside peered through the windows."
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb216e/43f17890/5e4f1d73/621dddf1/699165009/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-win-this?refcode=em150602b")
"The next day, in Muscatine, Iowa, after a rally at a community college drew twice the expected audience of 50..."
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb216e/43f17890/5e4f1d73/621dddf1/699165009/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-win-this?refcode=em150602b")
"... Mr. Sanders seemed to be experiencing a contact high from the size of his crowds."
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb216e/43f17890/5e4f1d73/621dddf1/699165009/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-win-this?refcode=em150602b")
"Be amazed at what you saw here," he said, adding, "I want to win this."
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb216e/43f17890/5e4f1d73/621dddf1/699165009/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-win-this?refcode=em150602b")
But it's not just Iowa. More than 4,000 people came out on Sunday to see Bernie in Minnesota.
[**Let's win this. Contribute $5 now to our campaign to elect Bernie Sanders as president.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb216e/43f17890/5e4f1d73/621dddf1/699165009/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-win-this?refcode=em150602b")
Thank you for all you do,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb216e/43f17890/5e4f1d73/621dddfe/699165009/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-win-this?refcode=emb150602b")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but if you'd like to, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb216e/43f17890/5e4f1d73/621dddff/699165009/VEsP/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb216e/43f17890/5e4f1d73/621dddfc/699165009/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Scott Walker
subject: How we turned things around in Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
_****_
****
****
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI3NjEzNzAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgwMTg0MjMxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI3NjEzNzAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgwMTg0MjMxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,

I wanted to make sure you had the chance to see the op-ed I wrote for the New Hampshire _Union Leader._ In 6 years we have been able to lower our unemployment rate from 8.1% to 4.4% with hard work and big, bold reforms. Please take a moment to read it and pass it along to your friends and family.

Thanks,

Scott Walker

_**How we turned things around in Wisconsin**_
Scott Walker
_Union Leader_

The unemployment rate in the state of Wisconsin just hit a seven-year low of 4.4 percent, well below the national average. In December 2010, it was 8.1 percent.

Five years ago, Wisconsin ranked 41st in the country for places to do business, according to Chief Executive Magazine. Since then, the state has moved up to 12th best in America.

Wisconsin has come a long way in a very short time.

A dismal economy wasn't the only problem. As we came into office, the state faced a $3.6 billion deficit, the rainy day fund was nearly drained and special interests dictated things at the state and local levels.

Thankfully, we changed all of that, and today Wisconsin is a much better place. We turned that deficit into a surplus, and our next state budget starts with a $499 million structural surplus. Wisconsin has the only pension system fully funded, and the rainy day fund is 165 times bigger than when I first took office.

Most importantly, we took on the big government special interests and won. We put the power back into the hands of the hard-working taxpayers. Liberal union bosses didn't care too much for our reforms, so they organized more than 100,000 protesters to occupy our state Capitol grounds. They wanted to intimidate us. Instead, we thought more about the next generation than the next election.

Our reforms went beyond balanced budgets. Today, we do not require seniority or tenure, so schools can hire based on merit and pay based on performance. That means we can put the best and the brightest in the classroom.

In turn, our schools are better. Graduation rates are up. Third grade reading scores are higher. In fact, Wisconsin has the second best ACT scores in the country for states where more than half the students take the exam.

We reduced the burden on hard-working taxpayers by $2 billion. We cut income taxes in all brackets and lowered the burden on employers. Property taxes on a typical home are lower today than they were four years ago.

To make college more affordable for students and working families, we froze tuition. Plus, we invested in worker training and technical colleges to get people the education and skills needed for careers that pay two or three times the minimum wage.

For those who are able to work, we require job training and drug test screening before we provide public assistance. We want to help everyone who wants a job to find a job.

During the past four years, we passed regulatory reform, lawsuit reform, Castle Doctrine, concealed carry, pro-life legislation and a law requiring a photo ID to vote. Plus, Wisconsin is the 25th state to enact a Right to Work law. It gives every person the freedom to work where they want regardless of whether they are in a labor union.

Bottom line: We found a way to fight and win for the hard-working taxpayers. If we can do it in a state like Wisconsin where the majority of voters have not voted Republican for President since 1984, we can enact common-sense, conservative reforms anywhere in the country.

Many of the politicians in Washington are good at fighting, but they never seem to win those battles. Many others are good at winning elections, but they never seem to fight the important battles. Now, more than ever, Americans need a champion who will stand up and fight -- and win -- for them and their families.

**
**

Paid for by Our American Revival

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Our American Revival. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Our American Revival's online community. If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Our American Revival, click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=22761370&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgwMTg0MjMxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
